summary: End-to-end product, governance, artifact, packaging, and installed-plugin validation for Agentic SDLC 0.5.0.

commands.summary: 80 tests passed, including delegated authorization, task-start freshness, assessment routing, format enforcement, artifact verification, concurrency, packaging, and baseline discovery.
CLI and asset generator syntax checks passed.
Version, manifest entry point, skills, preset, and project KB checks passed.
Codex plugin manifest and package structure are valid.

commands.command: clean personal-marketplace reinstall and installed CLI doctor
commands.summary: The enabled installed plugin reports 0.5.0 and its CLI SHA-256 matches the repository source.

commands.command: installed Codex Italian assessment checkpoint scenario
commands.summary: The plugin explained observed facts, architecture gaps, assumptions, unknowns, and exact approval scope, then stopped at Checkpoint 1 without producing an assessment.

commands.command: real DOCX and XLSX generation, render inspection, output linking, and strict gates
commands.summary: Both OOXML artifacts received passed verification receipts with visual evidence and zero strict-gate errors.

notes: The full installed Codex checkpoint transcript and rendered artifact smoke tests were executed in disposable temporary repositories; the durable pass summary is recorded here.
Public GitHub release publication is intentionally not performed without an explicit version-tag release action.
